title: March Ridge, KY
description: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> MARCH RIDGE <LINE> <LINE><LEFT> <SIZE:small>  At-tent-ion! March Ridge serves as the home of many of Fort Knox's brave soldiers and their families. <LINE> <LINE> Despite its structured layout and secured access, March Ridge has plenty of opportunities for "R and R". <LINE> <LINE> Rent your favorite flick at Hit Vids. Catch the latest blockbusters at the Star-E-Plex. <LINE>  <LINE> You can even take a tour of the abandoned Cold War nuclear bunker - and be thankful the apocalypse never happened!
